executives.name: George Burns
executives.background: George Burns has over 35 years of experience in the mineral sector including executive, operations and project development leadership roles. Prior to joining Eldorado, he was Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer at Goldcorp. He has also held positions at Centerra Gold Inc., Asarco LLC, and Cyprus Amax Minerals Company.

executives.name: Kay Priestly
executives.background: Independent Director. Former CEO of Turquoise Hill Resources Ltd. and executive at Rio Tinto.

board_of_directors.name: George Burns
board_of_directors.background: George Burns has over 35 years of experience in the mineral sector including executive, operations and project development leadership roles. Prior to joining Eldorado, he was Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer at Goldcorp. He has also held positions at Centerra Gold Inc., Asarco LLC, and Cyprus Amax Minerals Company.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Gillin
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gillin is a corporate director and has served on several boards in the mining and financial sectors. He was previously Chairman and CEO of Tahera Diamond Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Livia Mahler
board_of_directors.background: Livia Mahler has over 30 years of experience in the venture capital and investment sectors.
